name: Alucard
short_description: A vampiric swordsman who sustains himself with the blood of enemies.
lore: Alucard was raised by monks but thirsted for more. As darkness grew in his realm, he mastered blood magic and vowed to end the night's worst nightmares. He roams the battlefield seeking strong foes.

name: Layla
short_description: A cheerful girl who defends her home with a powerful energy cannon.
lore: Layla is the daughter of a famous engineer. After her father's disappearance, she took up his unfinished weapon to protect the city from monsters. Her optimism is as bright as her energy blasts.

name: Miya
short_description: An elf archer blessed by the moon, she fights to protect her forest home.
lore: Miya is the last of the moon elves, chosen by the goddess to wield the Moonlight Bow. She now roams the Land of Dawn, seeking allies to drive back the darkness.

name: Eudora
short_description: A mage who commands lightning and storms, punishing those who dare cross her.
lore: Eudora was a scholar of the Arcane Academy until lightning struck her tower, granting her control over storms. She now serves as the academy's defender.

name: Saber
short_description: A cyborg assassin who uses high-tech blades to eliminate targets swiftly.
lore: Once a soldier, Saber was rebuilt as a weapon after a near-fatal battle. He now fights for justice, though his past remains a mystery.

name: Akai
short_description: A cheerful panda who uses his massive belly to disrupt enemies and protect allies.
lore: Akai comes from a long line of panda guardians. He travels the land to prove his worth, always carrying his family's sacred barrel.

name: Rafaela
short_description: A divine messenger who heals allies and reveals enemies with holy light.
lore: Rafaela descended from the heavens to guide heroes in the Land of Dawn. Her wings carry hope to those in despair.

name: Franco
short_description: A brute who drags enemies with his chain and beats them senseless.
lore: Franco was an outlaw from the northern wastelands. He now uses his strength to serve the Light, though his methods remain crude.

name: Chou
short_description: A martial artist whose swift kicks and combos keep enemies on the ground.
lore: Chou trained in a remote monastery, mastering the art of jeet kune do. He now travels to test his skills against the world's strongest.

name: Nana
short_description: A playful cat girl who uses magic and her cat Molina to annoy enemies.
lore: Nana hails from the magical kingdom of Atrem. Her curious nature often gets her into trouble, but her feline agility always saves the day.

name: Bruno
short_description: A superstar athlete who kicks explosive balls at his foes.
lore: Bruno was the captain of the Moniyan Football Team until an accident gave him the power to infuse his shots with energy. Now he fights for glory.

name: Clint
short_description: A gunslinger who fires rapid shots and roots enemies with his traps.
lore: Clint was a sheriff in the Wild West, now transported to the Land of Dawn. He brings his trusty revolvers and sense of justice.

name: Gord
short_description: A genius who manipulates sound waves and lasers to disintegrate enemies.
lore: Gord was a scientist obsessed with sound. After an experiment went wrong, he gained the ability to control sonic energy, becoming a living weapon.

name: Harley
short_description: A mischievous boy who throws cards and teleports around the battlefield.
lore: Harley ran away from the Magic Academy to become a street performer. His tricks often land him in trouble, but his magic always saves the day.

name: Balmond
short_description: A massive orc whose axe grows stronger with each enemy slain.
lore: Balmond led the orc clans in a failed invasion. Now a mercenary, he fights for gold and glory, his axe forever thirsty for blood.

name: Minotaur
short_description: A gentle giant who transforms into a raging beast when angered.
lore: Minotaur was the guardian of a labyrinth until a curse made him lose control. He now seeks redemption, protecting allies with his massive frame.

name: Alice
short_description: A vampire queen who drains life from enemies and becomes invincible.
lore: Alice was a noblewoman who made a pact with darkness to gain eternal life. She now commands blood magic, seeking to expand her undead domain.

name: Zilong
short_description: A quick spear-wielder who chases down enemies with relentless speed.
lore: Zilong was orphaned and raised by dragons. He now fights to unite the eastern lands, his spear guided by the spirit of the dragon.

name: Lolita
short_description: A genius mechanic who wields a massive shield that can reflect projectiles.
lore: Lolita inherited her family's workshop and built her own combat armor. She now protects the weak with her inventions, always eager for a challenge.

name: Hayabusa
short_description: A ninja who teleports through shadows and eliminates isolated targets.
lore: Hayabusa is the heir to the Shinobi clan. He travels to perfect his skills and avenge his father, leaving only shadows in his wake.

name: Freya
short_description: A winged warrior who descends from the sky to crush enemies.
lore: Freya is a Valkyrie from the celestial realm, sent to judge the worth of mortals. Her spear chooses only the bravest souls.

name: Karina
short_description: An elf assassin who dances between enemies, resetting her skills with each kill.
lore: Karina was trained by the Shadow Sect to become the perfect killer. She now follows her own path, seeking worthy opponents.

name: Aurora
short_description: A queen who commands ice, freezing enemies solid with her spells.
lore: Aurora was once a princess of the northern kingdom. Betrayed by her own, she now rules the frozen wastes, her heart as cold as her magic.

name: Kagura
short_description: A shrine maiden who controls a demonic umbrella, switching between offensive and defensive stances.
lore: Kagura inherited the Seimei Umbrella from her grandfather. She travels to master its power, accompanied by the spirit inside.

name: Gatotkaca
short_description: A legendary hero from the Mahabharata, with skin as hard as iron.
lore: Gatotkaca is the son of Bima, blessed with invulnerable skin. He joins the battlefield to uphold justice, his roar shaking the earth.

name: Hilda
short_description: A fierce barbarian who gains strength from brushes and regenerates quickly.
lore: Hilda grew up in the wilderness, learning to survive. She now leads the northern barbarians, her axes always ready for battle.

name: Moskov
short_description: A spear-wielding marksman who impales enemies and teleports through walls.
lore: Moskov is a former soldier betrayed by his empire. He now fights for revenge, his spear guided by fate.

name: Johnson
short_description: A robot that transforms into a car, running over enemies and stunning them.
lore: Johnson was a prototype war machine that gained sentience. He now fights alongside humans, his engine roaring with every charge.

name: Cyclops
short_description: A small mage who fires star energy orbs and reduces skill cooldowns.
lore: Cyclops is a genius from the planet X, stranded on the Land of Dawn. He uses his cosmic powers to protect his new home.

name: Ruby
short_description: A scythe-wielding girl who pulls enemies and heals from each skill hit.
lore: Ruby was cursed to be forever young, but gained control over shadows. She now fights to break the curse, her scythe draining life from foes.

name: Sun
short_description: A mischievous monkey who creates clones of himself to confuse enemies.
lore: Sun is the Monkey King, blessed by the gods with immortality. He roams the land playing tricks, but fights fiercely when provoked.

name: Irithel
short_description: A archer who rides a giant tiger, shooting while moving.
lore: Irithel was raised by animals after her tribe was destroyed. She now commands a great tiger, fighting to protect the natural order.

name: Argus
short_description: A fallen angel who becomes immortal for a short time, swinging his massive sword.
lore: Argus was once the leader of the angels, cast out for his pride. He now seeks to reclaim his power, his sword fueled by vengeance.

name: Lesley
short_description: A deadly assassin who snipes from long range, dealing guaranteed criticals.
lore: Lesley is the top agent of the Vanguard Strike Force. Her rifle never misses, and her true identity is known only to a few.

name: Zhask
short_description: An alien overlord who summons a powerful spawn to fight for him.
lore: Zhask is the leader of an alien swarm, seeking to conquer the Land of Dawn. His hive mind controls countless minions.

name: Vexana
short_description: A necromancer who summons undead knights and curses enemies.
lore: Vexana was a queen who lost her kingdom to betrayal. She now commands the dead, seeking to reclaim what was hers.

name: Kadita
short_description: A sea goddess who rides waves and emerges to strike down enemies.
lore: Kadita is the daughter of the sea, protecting the oceans from those who would pollute them. She can transform into water, avoiding harm.

name: Selena
short_description: A dual-form demon who traps enemies with abyssal traps and pounces in demon form.
lore: Selena was once a priestess of light, corrupted by the Abyss. Now she hunts those who enter her domain, her two forms wreaking havoc.

name: Fanny
short_description: A acrobatic assassin who swings around the map with cables, dealing burst damage.
lore: Fanny lost her legs in an accident but was rebuilt with cables by a genius mechanic. She now soars through the sky, seeking justice.

name: Lancelot
short_description: A charming swordsman who dances through enemies, becoming untargetable.
lore: Lancelot is a noble knight who fights for love and honor. His rapier skills are unmatched, and his charm disarms even the toughest foes.

name: Harith
short_description: A young prodigy who manipulates time, dashing around and slowing enemies.
lore: Harith stumbled upon a time-twisting artifact during his studies. Now he can rewind moments, always staying one step ahead.

name: Martis
short_description: A brutal warrior who gains attack speed with each skill, executing low-health enemies.
lore: Martis is a gladiator from the Ash Empire, seeking the strongest opponents. His blades never rest, and his thirst for battle is endless.

name: Gusion
short_description: A noble assassin who throws daggers and dashes to reset his skills.
lore: Gusion is the heir of the Paxley family, trained in the art of assassination. He uses his daggers to protect his family's honor.

name: Kimmy
short_description: A scientist who fires energy projectiles while moving, mixing physical and magic damage.
lore: Kimmy was a brilliant chemist until an explosion fused her with her own concoctions. She now fights to control her volatile powers.

name: Lunox
short_description: A girl with split personalities, switching between light and dark magic.
lore: Lunox was blessed and cursed by the Twin Gods. By day she brings light, by night she unleashes chaos, struggling to maintain balance.

name: Thamuz
short_description: A demon lord who throws his scythe and creates lava pools to dominate the battlefield.
lore: Thamuz rules a layer of the Abyss, commanding legions of demons. He descends upon the Land of Dawn to claim new territory.

name: Leomord
short_description: A fallen knight who rides a spectral horse, charging into battle.
lore: Leomord was betrayed and killed, but his spirit refused to rest. He now rides with his loyal steed, seeking vengeance.

name: Angela
short_description: A robotic doll who possesses allies, healing and shielding them from harm.
lore: Angela was created by a genius to protect the innocent. She seeks a heart of her own, connecting with others through her threads.

name: Aldous
short_description: A giant who stacks soul power by last-hitting, becoming unstoppable late game.
lore: Aldous made a pact with dark forces to gain immense power. He now consumes souls, growing stronger with each battle.

name: Khufra
short_description: An ancient mummy who uses bandages to disrupt enemies and jump into battle.
lore: Khufra was once a pharaoh, cursed to roam the desert forever. He now seeks to reclaim his kingdom, his bandages choking all who oppose.

name: Granger
short_description: A demon violinist who fires energy bullets, reloading after each burst.
lore: Granger sold his soul for musical genius, now his violin shoots deadly notes. He wanders the land, playing melodies of death.

name: X.Borg
short_description: A cyborg who sets enemies on fire and can eject his armor to become untargetable.
lore: X.Borg was a soldier enhanced with experimental fire tech. He now fights to control his own flames, a walking inferno.

name: Ling
short_description: A ninja who leaps across walls, striking from above with his blades.
lore: Ling was trained in the art of the wind, able to scale any surface. He protects the Eastern Vale from shadows, unseen and deadly.

name: Carmilla
short_description: A vampire who links enemies together, spreading damage and crowd control.
lore: Carmilla was a noblewoman turned vampire, seeking her lost love. She now manipulates blood to control the battlefield.

name: Atlas
short_description: A giant robot that pulls enemies into a ball and slams them into the ground.
lore: Atlas was created to protect the galaxy, but crash-landed on the Land of Dawn. Now he defends his new home with cosmic force.

name: Barats
short_description: A boy riding a giant dinosaur, growing larger as he gains stacks.
lore: Barats found a baby dino and raised it. Now they fight together, crushing enemies underfoot.

name: Mathilda
short_description: A fairy who dashes to allies, shielding them and then launching herself at enemies.
lore: Mathilda is a guardian fairy, protecting those who cannot protect themselves. Her wings carry her swiftly across the battlefield.

name: Brody
short_description: A dual-pistol wielding marksman who marks enemies and detonates the mark.
lore: Brody was an experiment, infused with abyssal energy. He now hunts those who wronged him, his bullets seeking vengeance.

name: Yve
short_description: An alien who projects a starry domain, slowing and damaging enemies inside.
lore: Yve travels the cosmos, recording the birth and death of stars. She now studies the Land of Dawn, her power cosmic.

name: Paquito
short_description: A boxer who unleashes combos, each skill enhanced by his fighting spirit.
lore: Paquito is a world champion boxer from another dimension. He now fights in the Land of Dawn, his fists doing the talking.

name: Benedetta
short_description: A swordswoman who dashes and slashes, her attacks fueled by a sword gauge.
lore: Benedetta is the leader of a ranger squad, fighting against corruption. Her blade moves faster than the eye can see.

name: Luo Yi
short_description: A yin-yang mage who links enemies and teleports them with her ultimate.
lore: Luo Yi mastered the balance of yin and yang, able to manipulate fate itself. She now seeks to restore harmony to the world.

name: Phoveus
short_description: A demon hunter who slams enemies with his pillar, empowered by enemy dashes.
lore: Phoveus was once a man, now transformed by the Abyss. He hunts demons relentlessly, his pillar crushing all who flee.

name: Natan
short_description: A physicist who manipulates time and space, reversing his own position.
lore: Natan discovered the secrets of reality, able to split timelines. He now experiments on the battlefield, his genius both a gift and a curse.

name: Aulus
short_description: A gladiator who gains attack speed and extra damage as the game progresses.
lore: Aulus was a slave forced to fight in the arena. He earned his freedom through blood, now he fights for glory.

name: Alpha
short_description: A cyborg warrior who commands a flying sword to strike down foes.
lore: Alpha was once a human soldier, now rebuilt as a weapon. His blade, Beta, fights alongside him, seeking redemption for a past he cannot remember.

name: Gloo
short_description: A slime that splits into multiple blobs, attaching to enemies and draining them.
lore: Gloo was an experiment gone wrong, a living ooze. It now attaches to anything, learning from its hosts.

name: Beatrix
short_description: A weapons expert who switches between four different guns, each with unique abilities.
lore: Beatrix is a prodigy inventor, crafting weapons for any situation. She tests her creations on the battlefield, always seeking the perfect shot.

name: Edith
short_description: A warrior who rides a mechanical dragon, switching between defensive and offensive modes.
lore: Edith bonded with a ancient dragon spirit, now she fights to protect the weak, her dragon form devastating foes.

name: Valentina
short_description: A mage who can copy the ultimate ability of an enemy hero.
lore: Valentina is a mysterious sorceress, able to steal the powers of others. She seeks the ultimate magic, leaving confusion in her wake.

name: Aamon
short_description: A assassin who becomes invisible and throws shards, ambushing enemies.
lore: Aamon is the brother of Gusion, wielding the power of shadows. He manipulates from the dark, unseen until it's too late.

name: Melissa
short_description: A girl who controls a doll Muno, bouncing enemies away and attacking from distance.
lore: Melissa lost her parents but found a magical doll. Together they explore the world, her scissors snipping any who threaten her.

name: Floryn
short_description: A fairy who heals allies globally with her ultimate and purifies crowd control.
lore: Floryn spreads dreams and hope, her flowers blooming wherever she goes. She heals with a touch, her magic pure.

name: Julian
short_description: A young mage whose skills evolve as he casts, with multiple enhanced abilities.
lore: Julian is a child genius, mastering magic at a young age. He fights to prove himself, his spells ever-changing.

name: Xavier
short_description: A mage who manipulates dimensions, extending his skills' range and trapping enemies.
lore: Xavier can see across dimensions, manipulating space to his will. He seeks to understand the universe, one battle at a time.

name: Fredrinn
short_description: A crystal-armored warrior who stores damage and unleashes it in devastating combos.
lore: Fredrinn is a guardian of the crystal mines, his body fused with gems. He endures all to protect his home.

name: Joy
short_description: A rhythmic assassin who dashes to the beat, dealing more damage with perfect timing.
lore: Joy dances through battle, her movements a deadly rhythm. She brings chaos and music wherever she goes.

name: Arlott
short_description: A holy warrior who marks enemies and dashes to them, dealing enhanced damage.
lore: Arlott was a fallen priest, redeemed by light. He now hunts demons, his spear guided by faith.

name: Ixia
short_description: A marksman who fires energy blasts that explode on hit, scaling with attack speed.
lore: Ixia harnesses star energy, her blasts illuminating the battlefield. She fights for cosmic balance.

name: Novaria
short_description: A mage who projects a star that reveals enemies and fires long-range beams.
lore: Novaria reads the stars, predicting fate. She manipulates celestial energy to control the battlefield.

name: Chip
short_description: A robotic squirrel who creates portals for allies to teleport across the map.
lore: Chip is a curious bot, tinkering with space-time. He helps his team move as one, always exploring.

name: Cici
short_description: A cheerful girl who throws party bombs and dances around enemies.
lore: Cici brings joy wherever she goes, but her party bombs pack a punch. She fights to spread happiness.

name: Nolan
short_description: An assassin who manipulates time, leaving afterimages and rewinding damage.
lore: Nolan was a guardian of time, now broken. He seeks to fix the timeline, one kill at a time.

name: Vale
short_description: A mage who commands wind, gathering storms to blow enemies away.
lore: Vale was a monk who learned to control the winds. He now roams, his gusts both gentle and deadly.

name: Valir
short_description: A fiery mage who pushes enemies back with flames and burns them over time.
lore: Valir was a prince consumed by fire, reborn as a spirit of flame. He now burns all who oppose him.

name: Khaleed
short_description: A desert warrior who heals from sand and charges across the battlefield.
lore: Khaleed is a nomadic swordsman, his blade swift as the desert wind. He protects the oases from invaders.

name: Esmeralda
short_description: A dancer who absorbs shields from enemies and converts them into HP.
lore: Esmeralda was a celestial performer, now she dances through battle, stealing light from foes.

name: Uranus
short_description: A celestial being who regenerates constantly and slows enemies with cosmic rings.
lore: Uranus fell from the heavens, now he protects the land. His rings heal him endlessly.

name: Terizla
short_description: A blacksmith who swings a massive hammer, dealing true damage to low-HP enemies.
lore: Terizla was a blacksmith who forged weapons, now he uses his own creation. His hammer crushes all.

name: Bane
short_description: A pirate who fires cannonballs and heals from his abilities.
lore: Bane was a pirate cursed with immortality. He now sails the Land of Dawn, his ship replaced by his own body.

name: Kaja
short_description: A electric bee who suppresses enemies and pulls them toward allies.
lore: Kaja was a guardian of the hive, his sting paralyzing foes. He now protects the innocent.

name: Hanzo
short_description: A ninja who can separate his spirit from his body to assassinate safely.
lore: Hanzo mastered the art of shadow, his spirit a deadly weapon. He hunts from beyond the grave.

name: Hanabi
short_description: A ninja who throws bouncing shurikens and gains a shield from her passive.
lore: Hanabi was cast out from her clan, now she fights alone. Her petals scatter and slice.

name: Yin
short_description: A boxer who pulls enemies into his domain, dueling them one-on-one.
lore: Yin mastered the flame fist, able to isolate foes. He fights for honor, one duel at a time.

name: Masha
short_description: A woman with three HP bars, sacrificing health for attack speed and damage.
lore: Masha was raised by bears, gaining their resilience. She now fights to protect her forest.

name: Wanwan
short_description: A agile archer who jumps over walls and unleashes tigers after marking enemies.
lore: Wanwan is a playful tigress, but her arrows are deadly. She hunts for fun and food.

name: Claude
short_description: A monkey marksman who creates a clone and teleports with it.
lore: Claude escaped from a lab, gaining the ability to duplicate. He now fights for freedom.

name: Karrie
short_description: A marksman who deals true damage with her skill-enhanced basic attacks.
lore: Karrie wields ancient lightwheels, her attacks piercing armor. She fights for her tribe.

name: Roger
short_description: A werewolf who transforms between human and wolf forms, gaining different abilities.
lore: Roger was bitten by a werewolf, now he struggles to control the beast within.

name: Diggie
short_description: A mechanical owl who protects allies from crowd control and lays time bombs.
lore: Diggie was a scholar who turned himself into an owl. He now watches over his friends.

name: Estes
short_description: An elf king who heals multiple allies at once, keeping his team alive.
lore: Estes is the ancient king of the moon elves, his healing light eternal. He guides his people.

name: Belerick
short_description: A treant who links to allies, sharing damage and taunting enemies.
lore: Belerick is the guardian of the forest, his roots unbreakable. He protects nature.

name: Badang
short_description: A martial artist who creates walls and unleashes rapid punches.
lore: Badang was a slave who gained godlike strength. He now fights for freedom, his fists breaking chains.

name: Lapu-Lapu
short_description: A warrior who wields two swords and can transform into a giant chicken.
lore: Lapu-Lapu is a hero of the islands, his bravery unmatched. He defends his home with pride.

name: Jawhead
short_description: A scrap robot who throws allies or enemies and locks onto targets with missiles.
lore: Jawhead was built from junk, but he has a heart. He protects his friends, even by throwing them to safety.

name: Guinevere
short_description: A magical knight who leaps into the air and slams down, knocking up enemies.
lore: Guinevere is a noble knight, her magic enhancing her sword. She fights for love and justice.

name: Dyrroth
short_description: A demon prince who marks enemies and gains bonus damage when attacking marked foes.
lore: Dyrroth was the prince of the Abyss, corrupted by darkness. He seeks to conquer all.

name: Minsitthar
short_description: A king who throws spears and creates a zone that prevents dashes.
lore: Minsitthar was betrayed and killed, but revived by light. He now protects his kingdom.

name: Silvanna
short_description: A princess who wields a lance and creates a circular arena, trapping enemies.
lore: Silvanna fights to reclaim her kingdom, her light burning bright. She traps foes in her domain.

name: Baxia
short_description: A shield-bearing warrior who reflects damage and spins through enemies.
lore: Baxia is an ancient guardian of the Eastern lands. His massive shield and resilient shell make him an immovable force in battle.

name: Cecilion
short_description: A vampire who gains infinite mana and rains bats upon his enemies.
lore: Cecilion, the lord of vampires, seeks to expand his undead dominion. His bat swarm grows stronger with every cast.

name: Chang'e
short_description: A celestial archer who fires moonlit arrows and protects herself with a shield.
lore: Chang'e was banished to the mortal realm but still draws power from the moon. Her arrows carry the light of the heavens.

name: Faramis
short_description: A warlock who revives fallen allies and blasts enemies with ghostly energy.
lore: Faramis commands the souls of the dead, binding them to his will. He seeks to reunite with his lost love beyond the grave.

name: Grock
short_description: A stone giant who controls walls and becomes stronger near terrain.
lore: Grock is an ancient elemental, born from the mountains themselves. He defends his rocky home with unyielding strength.

name: Helcurt
short_description: A venomous assassin who silences enemies and strikes from the darkness.
lore: Helcurt was betrayed by his own kind and now hunts those who speak. His sting brings silence and death.

name: Hylos
short_description: A centaur-like guardian who uses HP to cast spells and slows enemies with his aura.
lore: Hylos is the last of the ancient forest guardians, his antlers channeling the life force of the woods.

name: Lylia
short_description: A little girl who controls shadowy slugs and can rewind time to a previous position.
lore: Lylia wandered into a cursed forest and emerged with power over shadows. She now plays with her slug friends, but they obey her commands.

name: Natalia
short_description: A stealthy killer who vanishes from sight and ambushes isolated targets.
lore: Natalia was trained from childhood to be the perfect blade in the dark. She serves no master, only the thrill of the hunt.

name: Odette
short_description: A graceful princess who dances through enemies, dealing continuous magic damage.
lore: Odette was cursed to live as a swan by day, but at night she dances with haunting beauty, charming all who watch.

name: Pharsa
short_description: A winged sorceress who bombards enemies from afar and can transform into a bird.
lore: Pharsa was once a celestial guardian, now fallen. She watches over the land from above, striking those who threaten peace.

name: Popol & Kupa
short_description: A young trapper fights alongside his faithful wolf, setting traps and barking orders.
lore: Popol lost his parents in the northern wastes but found a loyal wolf pup, Kupa. Together they survive and protect travelers.

name: Sora
short_description: A nimble warrior who uses wind to launch himself into the air and dive onto enemies.
lore: Sora trained under the winds of the Eastern Highlands, learning to move like a gale. He now fights to unite the scattered clans.

name: Suyou
short_description: A fluid fighter who flows like water, striking multiple times with his twin blades.
lore: Suyou is a master of the hidden water style, his movements unpredictable as a river. He defends the coastal villages from pirates.

name: Tigreal
short_description: A noble knight who charges into battle, pushing enemies and setting up devastating setups.
lore: Tigreal is the captain of the Moniyan Guard, unwavering in his duty. He leads from the front, shield raised high.

name: Yi Sun-shin
short_description: A naval commander who fires cannonballs from his turtle ship and can stealth to ambush.
lore: Yi Sun-shin defends the seas with his legendary turtle ship. His cannons bombard enemies from unexpected angles.

name: Yu Zhong
short_description: A fearsome warlord who transforms into a dragon, spewing shadow fire.
lore: Yu Zhong seeks to revive the Black Dragon and claim the Land of Dawn. His fists carry the fury of a beast.

name: Zetian
short_description: A divine empress who commands the heavens, raining down stars and summoning celestial guards.
lore: Zetian rules the celestial realm with grace and power. She descends to the mortal world to restore balance, her will enforced by heavenly light.

name: Zhuxin
short_description: A mysterious spirit who controls floating lanterns that drain life and reveal foes.
lore: Zhuxin was once a mortal who merged with a spirit lantern. Now she wanders, guiding lost souls with her flickering lights.

name: Marcel
short_description: A mysterious figure who manipulates time to aid allies and hinder foes.
lore: Marcel appeared from a rift in time, his motives unclear. He bends moments to his will.

name: Obsidia
short_description: A being from the void who erases enemies from existence with dark energy.
lore: Obsidia was born in the emptiness between stars. She now seeks to understand life by extinguishing it.

name: Lukas
short_description: A beastmaster who fights alongside his wolf, gaining strength as they hunt together.
lore: Lukas was raised by wolves, his bond with them unbreakable. He protects the wilds from intruders.

name: Kalea
short_description: A crystal archer who fires piercing beams that change color and effect.
lore: Kalea is a living crystal, her body refracting light into deadly lasers. She seeks to understand her own existence.
